iteration_scores.changes: Rewrote skill to use static SVG approach instead of dynamic D3.js. Emphasized reading CSV first, computing positions manually, and writing SVG elements directly in HTML without JavaScript.
Strengthened no-JavaScript instructions with ABSOLUTE RULES section. Added explicit checklist. Made templates more prescriptive.
Added complete working examples for both bar and line charts with full SVG markup. Added computation formulas. Inconsistent - model still reverts to JS for one chart type.

Provided near-complete static SVG examples with exact HTML structure to copy. Made examples more concrete with actual computed values. Model follows bar chart template but still uses JS for line chart.

Moved line chart section before bar chart for prominence. Explicitly addressed the 90-point path concern. Added stronger emphasis that line chart is just one long path string. Added date label computation guidance.

remaining_issues.line-chart: date-formatting criterion fails - model omits year '2026' from date labels in some runs. The model has a strong tendency to revert to JavaScript for line charts despite explicit instructions.
